transcript.narrator_intro: Listen to a conversation between a man and a woman.

dialogue.speaker: M1
dialogue.text: Did you make an appointment at the campus health center?

dialogue.speaker: F1
dialogue.text: Yes. I scheduled one online because they fill up quickly during flu season.

transcript.question_intro: Why did the woman schedule the appointment online?

questions.prompt: Why did the woman schedule the appointment online?

choices.text: She wanted to get an appointment before they filled up.
The health center accepts only online appointments.
She needed to cancel another appointment.
She was already at the health center.

questions.explanation: She explains that appointments fill up quickly during flu season.
questions.evidence: They fill up quickly during flu season.
